game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **LIMBO**: Players control a boy in a 2D side-scrolling world, navigating through dark, monochromatic environments by swiping left or right to move and tapping to jump. The core gameplay involves solving physics-based environmental puzzles, such as pushing crates, swinging on ropes, or activating levers, often requiring precise timing and interaction with the game world by tapping and holding to grab objects. Hazards like giant spiders, bear traps, or hostile figures result in instant, often graphic, death, immediately restarting the player from the last automatic checkpoint. Progression is linear, with difficulty scaling through increasingly complex multi-stage puzzles and more dangerous environmental threats, without explicit unlock systems or numerical scores. The objective is to survive and advance through the narrative, with the game ending upon reaching the final sequence.
game_info.description: You are a boy lost in a dark, mysterious world. Navigate through dangerous environments filled with deadly traps, hostile creatures, and physics-based puzzles. Push crates, swing on ropes, activate levers, and avoid instant-death hazards like bear traps and giant spiders. Use precise timing and environmental interactions to survive. Your goal is to reach the end of this haunting journey through checkpoints that automatically save your progress.
game_info.controls:
Left Arrow: Move left
Right Arrow: Move right
Space: Jump
Z: Grab/interact with objects (hold to maintain grip)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/unpause
R: Restart to title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and interaction test. Validates that the player can move, jump, and interact with basic objects without errors. Tests fundamental game mechanics like grabbing crates and simple navigation.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player character left and right, perform jumps at regular intervals, and attempt to grab nearby objects when detected. Navigate through the first section of the level, testing basic physics interactions.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player successfully moves through the environment, jumps work correctly, grab mechanics function as intended, and collision detection works properly. No errors occur during basic gameplay interactions.

TEST_2.test_description: Complete game win test. Implements an optimal strategy to navigate through all puzzles and hazards to reach the final checkpoint. Tests the entire game flow from start to finish.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Execute a precise sequence of movements, jumps, and interactions to solve each puzzle in order. Push crates to create platforms, avoid all hazards with timed movements, use levers strategically, and navigate to each checkpoint until reaching the final goal.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player successfully completes the entire game, reaching the final checkpoint and triggering the GAME_OVER_WIN state. All puzzles are solved correctly, all hazards are avoided, and the game ends with a victory message.
